description_it: Migliora le tue competenze di livello A2 con frasi complete ed esempi d'uso quotidiano.

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Lei sta preparando la cena in questo momento."
exercises.correct_answer: She is cooking dinner right now.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Questo libro è migliore di quello.. Completa la frase in inglese: This book is ___ than that one.
exercises.correct_answer: better
options: best
good
well
better

exercises.prompt_it: Qual è la traduzione esatta per: "Ci incontreremo domani a mezzogiorno."?
options: We will meet tomorrow at noon.
We would meet tomorrow at noon.
We did meet tomorrow at noon.
We do meet tomorrow at noon.
exercises.correct_answer: We will meet tomorrow at noon.
exercises.explanation_it: L'unica forma corretta e naturale è: "We will meet tomorrow at noon.".

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Sei mai stato a Parigi?"
exercises.correct_answer: Have you ever been to Paris?

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Stava dormendo quando il telefono ha squillato.. Completa la frase in inglese: He was ___ when the phone rang.
exercises.correct_answer: sleeping
options: sleep
slept
sleeps
sleeping

exercises.prompt_it: Qual è la traduzione esatta per: "Non voglio comprare niente."?
options: I don't want to buy everything.
I don't want to buy nothing.
I don't want to buy something.
I don't want to buy anything.
exercises.correct_answer: I don't want to buy anything.
exercises.explanation_it: L'unica forma corretta e naturale è: "I don't want to buy anything.".

exercises.prompt_it: Traduci l'intera frase in inglese: "Devono partire immediatamente."
exercises.correct_answer: They must leave immediately.

exercises.prompt_en: L'italiano è: Sono andato al cinema ieri.. Completa la frase in inglese: I ___ to the cinema yesterday.
exercises.correct_answer: went
options: went
go
gone
going
